description: HTML report writes chat pages into chats/chat_{id}_{name}/ subdirectories, not the output root
steps: Run 'chat4n6 run' on a WhatsApp fixture with at least one message
Assert page_001.html exists inside that subdirectory
Assert root output dir does NOT contain any chat_{id}_{page}.html files

description: index.html links to chats/ subdirectory pages, not flat root files
steps: Run 'chat4n6 run' on a WhatsApp fixture
